title: Restrict Delete to head_trainer role
description: Delete button on ClassDetailScreen should only be visible to head_trainer users. Regular trainers keep View Participants and Edit.
acceptance_criteria: Delete button hidden for trainer role
Delete button visible for head_trainer role

title: Replace Alert.alert with custom ConfirmModal
description: Build a reusable ConfirmModal component and replace all Alert.alert confirmation calls across the app so dialogs work on web and native.
acceptance_criteria: All Alert.alert calls replaced in ClassDetailScreen
All Alert.alert calls replaced in other screens
Dialogs work on web and native
